current_phase: Phase 7: Interest Rate and Yield Curve ESG

Phase 1: Model Review & Documentation.description: Understand existing model structure, identify gaps vs industry standards, document assumptions and deviations
completed: Audit current model code and architecture
Document all model assumptions and parameters
Identify deviations from SOA stochastic modeling standards
Review existing validation and testing framework
Create initial assumptions document with SOA compliance notes
Map model components to IA governance requirements

Phase 2: Industry Standards Alignment.description: Align stochastic process definitions with SOA standards, implement required risk metrics, add governance framework compliance
completed: Implement SOA stochastic process documentation standards
Add Value at Risk (VaR) and Expected Shortfall (ES) metrics
Update parameter calibration methodology documentation
Implement governance and audit trail framework
Add scenario stress testing framework
Update model validation requirements per IA standards

Phase 3: Model Validation & Testing.description: Fix critical bugs, implement missing unit tests, wire governance into run loop, add data validation
completed: Fix distributed executor pickling bug
Fix ALM rebalancing logic for 100%-cash initial portfolio
Add ESGAdapter unit tests and data schema validation
Add HybridGrid unit tests -- boundary conditions
Wire AuditTrail into projection run loop
Add model point and assumption table data validation
Implement end-to-end integration test (deterministic ESG stub)
Implement automated model health checks

Phase 4: Calibration & Backtesting.description: Implement sample ESG generator, calibrate model parameters, implement TVOG computation, validate against reference data
tasks: Implement GBM-based sample ESG generator (removes Moody's dependency for testing)
Implement TVOG computation module (PV of guarantees across stochastic scenarios)
Implement parameter calibration methodology
Create backtesting dataset and framework
Generate backtesting reports with tail loss analysis
Perform sensitivity analysis on key parameters
Document model stability and limitations
completed: Implement GBM-based sample ESG generator (removes Moody's dependency for testing)
Implement TVOG computation module (PV of guarantees across stochastic scenarios)
Implement parameter calibration methodology
Create backtesting dataset and framework
Generate backtesting reports with tail loss analysis
Perform sensitivity analysis on key parameters
Document model stability and limitations

Phase 5: Documentation & Delivery.description: Final documentation, model card, risk disclosures, and deployment readiness
tasks: Create comprehensive model documentation
Develop model risk card with limitations and known issues
Write model usage guide and assumptions document
Create deployment readiness checklist
Final validation report and sign-off
Archive model version and release notes
completed: Create comprehensive model documentation
Develop model risk card with limitations and known issues
Write model usage guide and assumptions document
Create deployment readiness checklist
Final validation report and sign-off
Archive model version and release notes

Phase 6: ESG Scope and Architecture.description: Define the expanded multi-market economic scenario generator architecture, scenario schema, P/Q measure metadata, calibration interfaces, and compatibility with existing TVOG, risk, ALM, and reporting consumers
tasks: Define multi-market ESG requirements and scenario schema
Design scenario metadata and parameter snapshot structure
Define calibration data interfaces for curves, equity indices, FX, credit spreads, and correlations
Map ESG outputs to existing TVOG, VaR/ES, ALM, and reporting consumers
Add design documentation and acceptance tests for schema compatibility
completed: Define multi-market ESG requirements and scenario schema
Design scenario metadata and parameter snapshot structure
Define calibration data interfaces for curves, equity indices, FX, credit spreads, and correlations
Map ESG outputs to existing TVOG, VaR/ES, ALM, and reporting consumers
Add design documentation and acceptance tests for schema compatibility

Phase 7: Interest Rate and Yield Curve E.description: Implement negative-rate-capable risk-free rate models and starter market curves for USD, EUR, HKD, CNY, and JPY, with validation and market-consistency evidence
tasks: Implement enhanced Hull-White 1-factor process with explicit curve input and negative-rate support
Add G2++ design or prototype for two-factor curve dynamics
Support USD, EUR, HKD, CNY, and JPY starter curves through parameter files or fixtures
Add yield curve validation for discount factors, forwards, negative-rate paths, and stresses
Add Q-measure martingale evidence for discount factors
in_progress: Implement enhanced Hull-White 1-factor process with explicit curve input and negative-rate support
Phase 7: Interest Rate and Yield Curve E.next: Add G2++ design or prototype for two-factor curve dynamics

Phase 8: Equity, FX, and Correlation ESG.description: Add regional equity factors, FX translation where needed, and cross-risk-factor correlation validation for US, Europe, Hong Kong / China, Japan, and Asia ex-Japan markets
tasks: Add US, Europe, Hong Kong / China, Japan, and Asia ex-Japan equity factors
Add FX return factors where currency translation is needed
Implement correlation matrix validation, positive-semidefinite repair or rejection, and scenario diagnostics
Add P-measure backtest scaffold for equity return distribution and correlation stability
Document model limitations and upgrade path to stochastic volatility or jump diffusion
Phase 8: Equity, FX, and Correlation ESG.next: Add US, Europe, Hong Kong / China, Japan, and Asia ex-Japan equity factors

Phase 9: Asset Class and Derivative Libr.description: Expand asset coverage to richer fixed income, public equity, private credit, private equity, infrastructure, interest rate swaps, and bond forwards
tasks: Add fixed-income instruments with coupon, duration, spread, downgrade, and default loss fields
Add private credit, private equity, and infrastructure educational asset models
Add interest rate swap valuation and bond forward valuation examples
Add asset cashflow aggregation and market value roll-forward reporting
Add asset class stress tests and governance notes
Phase 9: Asset Class and Derivative Libr.next: Add fixed-income instruments with coupon, duration, spread, downgrade, and default loss fields

Phase 10: Hong Kong Participating Liabil.description: Enrich liability modelling for Hong Kong participating products, starting with cash dividend and reversionary bonus mechanics
tasks: Define Hong Kong cash dividend product mechanics and sample policy data
Define reversionary bonus mechanics including vested bonus, terminal bonus, and guarantee split
Implement dividend and bonus declaration assumptions and sensitivity hooks
Add asset-share support tests for cash dividend and reversionary bonus variants
Add liability reporting views for reserves, TVOG, bonus supportability, and management summaries
Phase 10: Hong Kong Participating Liabil.next: Define Hong Kong cash dividend product mechanics and sample policy data

Phase 11: 100,000-Policy Processing and.description: Demonstrate a realistic educational actuarial reporting cycle with 100,000 synthetic policies, chunked processing, checkpoints, reconciliation, validation, and reporting packs
tasks: Generate or ingest a 100,000-policy synthetic Hong Kong PAR portfolio
Add grouping, chunking, checkpoint restart, failed-chunk audit, and reconciliation
Add reporting-cycle workflow for assumption lock, model run, validation checks, output review, and sign-off pack
Add performance benchmarks and memory profiling
Create educational reporting pack with model run log, movement analysis, risk metrics, validation exceptions, and sign-off checklist
Phase 11: 100,000-Policy Processing and.next: Generate or ingest a 100,000-policy synthetic Hong Kong PAR portfolio

Phase 12: Governance, Calibration, and E.description: Package the expanded model as a governed educational tool with calibration examples, model limitation cards, tutorial runs, validation reports, and refreshed release documentation
tasks: Add calibration notebooks or scripts for curves, equity, credit, and liability assumptions
Add model limitation cards for every ESG and liability module
Add guided examples for pricing, valuation, TVOG, ALM, stress, and reporting close
Add validation dashboards or markdown reports
Refresh final documentation, release notes, and model risk card
Phase 12: Governance, Calibration, and E.next: Add calibration notebooks or scripts for curves, equity, credit, and liability assumptions

repository_info.last_commit_message: [Phase 6] Map ESG outputs to model consumers

completion_summary.test_suite: 946/946 passing (full suite run in unblocked Linux env; 928 prior + 18 new schema-compat)

post_v1_expansion_summary.scope: Multi-market ESG, negative-rate-capable interest rates, regional equity / FX / correlation, broader asset classes, Hong Kong participating liabilities, 100,000-policy educational reporting cycle
post_v1_expansion_summary.scope_control: Complete one task per cycle; user may adjust scope after each phase based on development progress and outcome
post_v1_expansion_summary.current_decision: Begin with Phase 6 design before implementing additional generators or liability features
